sections.paragraph:
βραδύτης, ητος (on accent-ής,-ῆτος [t.r. Tdf. W-H. S. Vog. Bov.] cp. JWackernagel, NGG 1909, 58ff; Schwyzer I 382), ἡ (s. βραδύς; Hom. et al.; Plut., Mor. 549; Appian, Bell. Civ. 4 p. 1052, 16 Mendelssohn; Vett. Val. 289, 24; Sb 7741, 12 [II a.d.]; Philo, Op. M. 156; Jos., Ant. 7, 74; 13, 47) slowness ὥς τινες βραδύτητα ἡγοῦνται as some count slowness 2 Pt 3:9.—M-M.

t.r. t.r. = textus receptus

Tdf. Tdf. = CvTischendorf—List 1, beg.

W-H. W-H. = BWestcott/FHort—List 1, beg.

Vog. Vog. = HVogels, editor of the Greek NT—List 1, beg.

Bov Bov = JBover, ed. of the Greek NT—List 1, beg.

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

NGG NGG = Nachrichten der Gesellschaft der Wissenschaften zu/in Göttingen, Philologisch-historische Klasse—List 6

Schwyzer Schwyzer = ES., Griechische Grammatik—List 6

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Appian Appian , I–II a.d.—List 5

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 183
